stories.headline: Wuthering Waves announces Cyberpunk: Edgerunners collaboration details
stories.body:
Wuthering Waves × Cyberpunk: Edgerunners — Special Talk

Ahead of the launch of our collaboration with Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, we invite you to join us for a special talk featuring Bartosz Sztybor, VP of Franchise at CD PROJEKT RED & writer for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, and Milena Zając, writer & editor at CD PROJEKT RED. Together, we will share behind-the-scenes stories of our collaboration, explore cyberpunk themes, and discuss how our dev team brought the world of Edgerunners to life in-game.

Wuthering Waves × Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Collaboration is set to launch on June 8th (UTC+8).
The new 5-Star Resonators Lucy and Rebecca will debut, and you can snag the 5-Star Resonator Rebecca for free!

#WutheringWaves
#Edgerunners

stories.headline: House passes nearly $2B Ukraine aid package despite GOP opposition
stories.body:
BREAKING: The House passed a measure to provide almost $2 billion in aid to Ukraine and impose new sanctions against Russia on Thursday, sending the measure to the Senate behind a 226-to-195 tally — despite GOP leadership in full opposition to the measure.
https://abcnews.com/Politics/republicans-vote-democrats-pass-ukraine-aid-russia-sanctions/story?id=133595620&cid=social_twitter_abcn

stories.headline: Explanation of slang terms involving "cooked".
stories.body: Jfyi, "cooked" benchmarks means that they are benchmaxxed. Accountants "cook" books to dodge taxes. "Absolutely cooking" benchmarks means they are great as in "now we're cooking with gas" etc. "Absolutely cooked" also means that something is done for, meaning all hope is lost.

stories.headline: MIT professor announces breakthrough in self-evolving AI scientists for principled scientific discovery.
stories.body:
We've made a breakthrough in self-evolving AI scientists moving from "search" to "principled discovery": Scientific discovery requires that the search space itself changes, and an AI scientist must perceive this shift without intervention. We built an AI that achieves this for the first time with the ability to discover the scientific vocabulary it reasons in. Evidence, tools, artifacts, verifiers, failures & claims become typed provenance. We show three distinct modalities: 1) retrieval, adding known objects; 2) search, exploring a fixed schema; and critically: 3) discovery, a verified regime transition. 

We solve the open-endedness evaluation problem by lifting agentic workflows into a typed copresheaf and proving, via a Kan obstruction, that true discovery is not unbounded generation but a verifiable schema expansion: old evidence is transported by Left Kan extension, and genuine novelty is mathematically quantified by the pointwise residual beyond the transported image - separating discovery from mere search and making novelty objective and measurable rather than a subjective judgment or benchmark delta.

Our AI scientist is built in a way that does not pre-conceive the approach it chooses; instead, we endow the system with formal power to adapt, evolve, and reason from first principles. Case studies include: 
1⃣Builder/Breaker model that discovers mode-conditioned compliance in proteins;
2⃣CategoryScienceClaw that finds anisotropic fiber-network stiffness rules.

Great work in collaboration with my graduate student @fwang108_ @MITdeptofBE

F.Y. Wang & M.J. Buehler, Self-Revising Discovery Systems for Science: A Categorical Framework for Agentic Artificial Intelligence, arXiv:2606.01444, 2026

stories.headline: Special ops training with aircraft in Long Beach and Pasadena areas of Southern California.
stories.body:
Special operations forces conducted realistic training in an urban environment overnight in the Long Beach/Pasadena areas of Southern California, including aircraft of the U.S. Army's 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment (SOAR). This training is conducted by U.S. Army Delta Force, U.S. Navy SEALs, and other special forces units in major cities around the country several times per year.

Video from Long Beach Local News

stories.headline: Outgoing DNI Tulsi Gabbard to declassify intelligence on COVID origins and Havana Syndrome via weekly releases.
stories.body:
🇺🇸 Outgoing DNI Tulsi Gabbard is using her final weeks in office to declassify intelligence on COVID origins and Havana Syndrome before June 30, per an ODNI official.

The releases will come in weekly installments. A CIA whistleblower recently testified that Fauci and Biden's intel chief actively suppressed evidence pointing to a Wuhan lab leak. The CIA disputes it. 

Gabbard's office has already released over 500,000 pages of previously classified documents during her tenure.

Source: The Daily Caller, @emilyakopp

stories.headline: Iran pushes conspiracy theory that Israel is merging with US military
stories.body:
“Israel is merging with the U.S. military” That’s what the Islamic republic is pushing into the U.S. media narrative. 

The myth was invented by the Quincy Institute, founded by Trita Parsi — who himself has long been accused of working with the Islamic regime. 

The goal of the smear campaign isn’t to inform. It’s to manufacture paranoia and convince Americans that Israel secretly controls their government. The conspiracy theory is the point, and it’s straight from the playbook of the regime. 

@JNS_org
